source.notes: Guided-path section titles and explanatory copy are authored for the taxpayer-facing Property Snapshot prototype.

your-property.title: What changed about this property?
your-property.description: Start with ownership, location, class, land, dwelling facts, and record-card detail.

your-assessment.title: What changed about the assessed value?
your-assessment.description: Separate current assessment information from finalized tax years so pending pieces are not treated as final.

your-taxes.title: What does this mean for taxes?
your-taxes.description: Connect finalized tax history, effective tax rate, levy movement, and tax-pressure context.

tax-districts.title: Who is taxing this property?
tax-districts.description: Show where the bill goes and which authorities are in the property’s tax district.

market-area.title: How does this compare nearby?
market-area.description: Use valuation-group and PAD Reports and Opinions data rather than placeholder comparable-property cards.

county-equalization.title: How is the county performing overall?
county-equalization.description: County equalization measures show whether appraisals are generally close to market value and reasonably uniform.

state-context.title: How does the county compare statewide?
state-context.description: Statewide CTL trends give a broader baseline for local value growth, taxes levied, and average tax-rate movement.

review-checklist.title: Need to review anything?
review-checklist.description: Confirm the record, note unresolved questions, organize comparable research, and find filing materials if needed.
